About Us

Kinetic Speech Services, PLLC is privately owned and operated by Tiffany Fairdosi, M.S., CCC-SLP. Tiffany has over 10 years of experience as a speech-language pathologist (SLP) with extensive knowledge and experience in acute and inpatient rehabilitation hospitals, skilled nursing facilities, assisted living facilities, outpatient, and private practice. Before becoming a licensed SLP, she worked as a graduate assistant and SLP assistant in early childhood intervention.

She was awarded her Masters of Business Administration from Lamar University in May 2024. She received her undergraduate degree in chemistry from Texas Tech University in 2010 and her Masters of Science degree from Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center in 2013. She is certified by the American Speech, Language, and Hearing Association (ASHA) and is licensed in the state of Texas.

She is trained in SPEAK OUT!, Beckman Oral Motor, Passy-Muir speaking valve application in pediatrics and adults, myofascial release, kinesiotaping for swallowing, VitalStim, and Compton PSL for accent reduction. She has an enthusiastic energy and passion for providing therapy services and treating her patients as if they are family. She has received many awards and accolades during her career including the ASHA Ace Award twice for her commitment to continuing education in her field and both Employee of the Month and Employee of the Quarter at previous places of employment.

She is a local resident living on the west side of Pearland with her husband, two children, and their dog.

She is an active member of the Pearland community. During her free time, she is a volunteer for the Friends of the Westside Library and serves on the Program Committee and Adopt-A-Book Committee. She also manages a Book Club for the moms in her neighborhood. She may be spotted often chauffeuring her kids to their after school activities.

Ready to start? Let’s talk!

We verify insurance benefits and eligibility for BCBS and UHC.

Book an appointment

Give us a call to schedule an evaluation or click on “Book an Appointment.”

We accept:

  • Medicare Part B

  • Blue Cross Blue Shield

  • United Healthcare

Payment is due at the time of service. For out of network services, we provide you a superbill as we do not submit for reimbursements on your behalf. We make no guarantees that services will be reimbursed as all insurance providers may differ.

Please reach out to (832) 278-1955 to schedule your appointment with us

Book an Appointment

Kinetic Speech Services, PLLC Provides:

  • Evaluations

    1:1 evaluations addressing:

    -Articulation and speech intelligibility

    -Language processing and understanding

    -Expressive language

    -Aphasia or language loss

    -Dysphagia or difficulties swallowing

  • Individual Therapy

    After completion of a comprehensive evaluation, individualized therapy sessions are tailored to your needs.

    -Speech sound production and intelligibility

    -Following directions

    -Asking or answering questions

    -Vocabulary

    -Safe swallow function

Ready to start? Let’s talk!

We verify insurance benefits and eligibility for BCBS and UHC.

Our Services

Getting Started

What’s the process? Getting started can seem overwhelming but since we are a small independently operating practice, we try to make it as easy as possible.

  • Contact us via email at office@kineticspeech.com or call/text our office at: 832-278-1955

    Let us know your concerns!

    Are you a physician? Send your referral to:

    Fax: 877-920-2116

  • We are currently in network with Medicare Part B, PPO plans for Blue Cross Blue Shield (BCBS), and United Health Care (UHC), and select HMO plans with BCBS and UHC.

    We can provide a superbill to out of pocket/private pay clients so that they can seek independent reimbursement.

  • Let’s get scheduled! Fridays are open for evaluations between 9AM-5PM. We can schedule in office or even virtually depending on your needs and/or accessibility.

  • Our office is at 2880 Broadway Bend Dr, Bldg 3. We are located inside the Spacio.us Coworking office.

    Can’t drive? We offer virtual services! Depending on your concerns, we can treat you 1 on 1 through video calling right through our client portal. Don’t hesitate to ask us about this option!

  • Once you’ve had your evaluation completed and goals are established, we can start your sessions! Based on recommendations for frequency, we get you scheduled and get to working on your goals. Again, we can see you in office or virtually.

  • Happy with your services? Please leave us a review!

    Click here to leave a review!

Book An Appointment

Our Services

We provide comprehensive evaluations and individualized treatment plans to patients ranging from 2 years to 100 years old. We also offer a monthly book club for patients and caregivers with aphasia.

  • Evaluations are required for all new patients to determine areas of need, develop a treatment plan, and recommend goals that are individualized to the client’s needs. We address areas related to:

    • Pediatric articulation

    • Accent modification

    • Understanding information

    • Using words to communicate

    • Speech and voice changes

    • Difficulties with swallowing or dysphagia

    • Determining if an augmentative-alternative communication (AAC) device is an option

    Kinetic Speech Services specializes in adult language and swallowing related to neurological changes including stroke recovery and Parkinson’s disease.

  • Therapy sessions are provided one on one in the office or via telepractice to in-state residents.

    Treatment may address:

    • Articulation: speech sound production or slurred speech

    • Dysphagia: difficulties with swallowing

    • Learning new words

    • Asking and answering questions

    • Aphasia: language loss after stroke or brain related injury

    • Foreign accent modification or reduction

    • Voice changes related to neurological disorders

    • Training on AAC device use

  • We host a monthly aphasia friendly book club for patients and members of the community every third Friday of the month at 1:00PM. We encourage patients, friends, caregivers, and the community to use aphasia friendly cueing strategies and offer opportunities for communication, social interactions, and group support.

Book An Appointment

Ready to start? Let’s talk!

We verify insurance benefits and eligibility for BCBS and UHC.

We’re a small team with big ideas and a passion for doing things well.

Join Our Team

Tiffany Fairdosi, M.S., CCC-SLP, MBA

owner/speech-language pathologist

I am excited to be expanding my team as this practice grows! We are looking to hire an SLP and an OT to add to the team. Not sure if you want to take the leap and transition? Please reach out as we may have an opportunity for you anyway.

What I have to offer:

flexible scheduling

Contract vs. W-2

opportunities to grow from a few patients to a full caseload

Work-life balance

Easy to use EHR

After school hours

Extended schedule IF YOU WANT

Supportive family first environment

We are looking for another speech-language pathologist to join our team!

Licensed, CF, and assistants encouraged to apply

Apply Here!

Looking for a few extra clients or wanting to go from part time to full time? You can GROW with us! We are looking to hire an OT with pediatric experience. Not sure what you want to do but want to grow? Let us help!

Alternatively, if you already have a client caseload and need office space with lower overhead, please reach out!
